source_files.pdf: Generated `specs.md` from official manufacturer URLs previously stored in `pdf.txt`
source_files.finance: Generated from live official Rivian pages

finance_snapshot.msrp: Rivian has not published a live U.S. MSRP on the public R3 page.
finance_snapshot.total_before_tax: R3 is a future model page, so final MSRP, destination, taxes, fees, and option structure are not yet public.
finance_snapshot.apr: No live APR program is published on the R3 page.
finance_snapshot.finance_payment: No public monthly finance payment is published on the R3 page.
finance_snapshot.finance_down_payment: Not published on the public R3 page.
finance_snapshot.lease_payment: No public lease estimate is published on the R3 page.
finance_snapshot.incentives: Future incentives and launch economics are not yet public.
finance_snapshot.warranty: Final production-vehicle warranty and purchase-program details have not been published on the R3 page.
finance_snapshot.best_for: Shoppers tracking Rivian's smaller future crossover rather than the current R1 lineup.
finance_snapshot.financial_strengths: Gives the dataset a distinct future Rivian crossover entry beyond the truck/SUV-heavy current lineup.
finance_snapshot.financial_concerns: No public price means this entry remains financially speculative until Rivian publishes launch details.
finance_snapshot.notes: Snapshot uses Rivian's official R3 page on March 26, 2026. Public pricing was not published on the page at capture time.

image_strategy.note: Official Rivian R3 share image used as the canonical image for this future-model entry.
